center.title: Task Center
center.desktopOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app.
center.desktopUnavailable: The current browser development mode does not have Tauri ready, so local Thought/Task storage is not mounted.

thoughts.title: Thoughts
thoughts.emptyActive: No thoughts yet. Capture the first one.
thoughts.inputPlaceholder: Capture a thought... Use #tags to organize
thoughts.aiDiscussTooltip: Discuss with AI or create a task
thoughts.selectAtLeastTwo: Select at least 2 thoughts before merging
thoughts.mergePartial: Merge completed, but {{count}} source thought(s) could not be cleaned up. Delete them manually.
thoughts.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete {{count}} thought(s). This cannot be undone.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Capture a thought in the left panel, then click Dispatch to create one.
tasks.autoUpgradeSuccess: Automatically upgraded {{count}} legacy scheduled task(s) to the new task model
tasks.autoUpgradeFailed: {{count}} legacy task(s) failed to auto-upgrade: {{message}}. Open the detail panel and click "Upgrade to new task" to retry manually.
tasks.deleteConfirm: Delete task "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
tasks.upgraded: "{{name}}" was upgraded to the new task model

dispatch.subtitleFromThought: Create from the current thought and dispatch immediately
dispatch.name: Task name
dispatch.namePlaceholder: Example: Upgrade the OpenClaw Lark adapter to v2.4
dispatch.taskMdPlaceholder: Prompt the AI will execute. It defaults to the thought text; add details, goals, or constraints.
dispatch.verifyHint: (Optional · verify.md · read by AI during verifying)
dispatch.verifyPlaceholder:
Example:
- curl /health returns 200
- npm test passes
dispatch.verifyDescription: Leave empty to skip the verification stage. You can edit it after creation.
dispatch.workspaceHint: Uses this Agent's runtime, model, permissions, and MCP tools by default. Override them below in Advanced config.

validation.futureTimeRequired: Execution time must be in the future
validation.intervalTooShort: Recurring interval cannot be shorter than 5 minutes
validation.endConditionRequired: Set at least one end condition

toast.verifyWriteFailed: Task was created, but writing verify.md failed: {{message}}
toast.dispatched: Task "{{name}}" was dispatched. AI is running it.
toast.startFailed: Task was created, but starting execution failed: {{message}}

once.label: Run now
once.description: Start immediately after creation; the task appears in the task list.

scheduled.label: Scheduled once
scheduled.description: Trigger once at the specified time, then stop

recurring.label: Recurring
recurring.description: Trigger repeatedly at a fixed cadence; end conditions are available

loop.label: Ralph Loop
loop.description: Start the next round immediately after completion in the same session; requires an exit condition

execution.loopSessionStrategy: Continuous conversation (keeps context) - Ralph Loop always uses this mode
execution.newSessionDescription: Each run creates a fresh session with no history, keeping context clean
execution.singleSessionDescription: All runs reuse one session, so AI remembers previous context

endConditions.conditionalHint: Select one or more. The task stops when any selected condition is met.
endConditions.aiCanExit: Allow AI to end the task

notifications.desktopDescription: Show a system notification when task status changes
notifications.noChannels: This workspace has no available IM channels. Only desktop notifications will be sent.

advanced.title: Advanced config
advanced.subtitle: (Optional - override runtime, model, permissions, or MCP for this task)
advanced.runtimeHintDefault: Leave empty to follow the Agent workspace
advanced.externalNotice: This task runs on {{runtime}}. MCP tools are managed by {{runtime}} itself. Model and permission mode below are optional overrides for this runtime.
advanced.permissionHint: Leave empty to use the selected runtime's maximum permission mode for unattended tasks; choose a mode to force it.
advanced.modelHintBuiltin: Leave empty to follow the Agent current model; choose provider + model to force it
advanced.modelHintExternal: Leave empty to follow the Agent current model; choose a model to pass it to {{runtime}}
advanced.noMcp: No MCP tools are installed in Settings -> MCP Tools, so there is nothing to override here.
advanced.mcpFollowing: Currently following the Agent workspace MCP enable list
advanced.providerUnavailableTitle: This provider has no API key or is unavailable. Choose another one.
advanced.noProviders: No available providers yet. Add an API key or complete subscription login in Settings -> Model Providers.
advanced.providerMissingKey: This provider is missing an API key. Configure it in Settings -> Model Providers, or choose another provider above.
advanced.providerDeleted: This provider was removed from config. Choose an available provider above.
advanced.queryingModels: Querying model list from the CLI...
advanced.noRuntimeModels: This runtime has not provided a model list yet.

claude-code.plan: Planning mode; read-only and does not execute
claude-code.acceptEdits: Automatically accept file edits; confirm other actions

gemini.autoEdit: Automatically accept file edits; confirm other actions
gemini.plan: Planning mode; read-only and does not execute

builtin.auto: Default mode; tools request permission as needed
builtin.plan: Planning mode; read-only and does not execute
builtin.fullAgency: Skip all permission confirmations (Cron task default)

codex.suggest: Run only trusted commands automatically; confirm the rest
codex.auto-edit: Edit files automatically and run commands in the sandbox
codex.full-auto: Act autonomously in the sandbox and ask as needed
codex.no-restrictions: Skip all approvals and sandbox restrictions

schedule.unsupportedVisual: This expression cannot be edited visually

origin.directTitle: Direct dispatch: use the thought text as task.md
origin.alignedTitle: Alignment discussion: generate the full four documents through /task-alignment
